enum_values.name: AboveAndBelow
enum_values.summary: Renders Levels directly above and directly below the current Viewpoint.

enum_values.name: Above
enum_values.summary: Renders the Level directly above the current Viewpoint.

enum_values.name: Below
enum_values.summary: Renders the Level directly below the current Viewpoint.

enum_values.name: Locked
enum_values.summary: Renders just the level you are locked to.
